-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.category
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    category_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT category_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.ed_izm
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    ed_izm_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT ed_izm_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.postovschik
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    postovschik_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT postovschik_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.proizvoditel
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    proizvoditel_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT proizvoditel_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.pynkt_vidachi
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    pvz character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT pynkt_vidachi_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.role
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    role_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT role_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.status
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    status_pk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT status_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tovar
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    article_fk character varying(55) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    name_tovar character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    ed_izm_fk integer,
    sale numeric(10, 2),
    postovschik_fk integer,
    proizvoditel_fk integer,
    category_fk integer,
    skidka integer,
    quantity_on_sklad integer,
    opisanie character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    photo character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT tovar_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    role_fk integer,
    fio character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    login character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    password character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT users_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.zakaz
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    nomer_zakaza integer,
    data_zakaza date,
    data_dostavki date,
    adress_fk integer,
    fio integer,
    code integer NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY ( INCREMENT 1 START 1021 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 2147483647 CACHE 1 ),
    status_fk integer,
    CONSTRAINT zakaz_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.zakaz_tovar
(
    id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('article_id_seq'::regclass),
    nomer_zakaza_fk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    article_fk character varying(155) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    quantity character varying(55) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT article_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tovar
    ADD CONSTRAINT tovar_category_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (category_fk)
    REFERENCES public.category (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tovar
    ADD CONSTRAINT tovar_ed_izm_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (ed_izm_fk)
    REFERENCES public.ed_izm (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tovar
    ADD CONSTRAINT tovar_postovschik_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (postovschik_fk)
    REFERENCES public.postovschik (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.tovar
    ADD CONSTRAINT tovar_proizvoditel_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (proizvoditel_fk)
    REFERENCES public.proizvoditel (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.users
    ADD CONSTRAINT users_role_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (role_fk)
    REFERENCES public.role (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.zakaz
    ADD CONSTRAINT zakaz_adress_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (adress_fk)
    REFERENCES public.pynkt_vidachi (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.zakaz
    ADD CONSTRAINT zakaz_status_fk_fkey FOREIGN KEY (status_fk)
    REFERENCES public.status (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION
    NOT VALID;

END;
